problema.title: Women's sport still isn't getting the support it needs
problema.p1: Female physiology calls for a specific approach that the traditional model doesn't address.
problema.p2: The menstrual cycle, energy availability and hormonal health still aren't really part of training.
issues: Stress injuries and pelvic floor issues
problema.pMental: In addition, appearance pressure, anxiety or eating disorders directly affect performance and wellbeing.
problema.closing: Training without understanding your body has a cost

solucion.title: CicloActiva exists to change this
solucion.p1: A women's sports health project that integrates every dimension of the athlete.
solucion.p2: We don't only work on training.
solucion.p3: Together we address hormonal health, available energy, recovery and the athlete's full context.
solucion.p4: Training, nutrition, physiotherapy, gynaecology and psychology work in one coordinated process.
solucion.purpose: Empowering women athletes through knowledge, prevention and personalised support.
solucion.closingLine2: It's training while understanding your body

equipo.title: One team, one vision
equipo.p1: A multidisciplinary team working in a coordinated way to understand each case from every dimension.
equipo.p2: Decisions aren't made in isolation—they're made together.

workflowSteps.title: Initial assessment
workflowSteps.text: Full multidisciplinary review of the athlete

workflowSteps.title: Needs identification
workflowSteps.text: In-depth analysis of each dimension of health

equipo.value: Coordination between professionals makes it possible to adjust load, prevent injuries and optimise performance.
equipo.closingLine2: It's a system that works as a whole

about.p1: Ciclo Activa is a training application that integrates knowledge of female physiology into sport planning. It is aimed at athletes and users seeking an evidence-based approach to training and performance.
about.p2: The project takes a multidisciplinary approach: it combines sport science, physiology and cycle tracking to adapt load and intensity. The aim is to provide a clear tool that supports day-to-day decision-making, without replacing professional judgement.
about.p3: The app is in development. Its launch will be announced on this website and on Enduranc3 official channels.

accompaniment.invite: We're here to accompany you. If you'd like, we can tell you a bit more.
accompaniment.body: Ciclo Activa is a project in development: it's not an app yet. It's a different way of approaching training and health. We want to accompany you at your own pace.

accompanimentPersistent.invite: We're here if you want to understand what Ciclo Activa is.
accompanimentPersistent.panelBody: Ciclo Activa is an Enduranc3 project in development. It's not an app yet: it's a different way of approaching training and health. We're here to accompany you when you want to know more.

chatbot.ariaLabel: Guidance on women's health and training
chatbot.suggestionPrompt: Have a question? We'll take it step by step.

flow.intro: What would you like guidance on?

cycle.label: My cycle isn't regular
cycle.main:
The menstrual cycle is one of the most important health markers for women athletes.

Irregular cycles or missed periods are often linked to stress, training load or low energy availability.
cycle.question1: Have you noticed recent changes in your training or nutrition?
cycle.afterChoice: Thanks for sharing. Looking at your cycle alongside load, rest and energy helps build a clearer picture—without labelling or judging.

fatigue.label: I always feel tired
fatigue.main:
Constant fatigue in women athletes is often related to training load, recovery or energy availability.

It can also interact with your menstrual cycle and hormonal health.
fatigue.question1: Do you find it hard to recover even when you reduce your training load?
fatigue.afterChoice: How you sleep, eat and manage stress matters. These are signals worth reviewing calmly, with a whole-person view.

performance.label: I want to improve my performance
performance.main:
Improving performance isn't just "train more": it lines up with solid recovery, stable energy and hormonal context that fits your life stage.

Pushing load without those foundations often stalls progress.
performance.question1: Do you feel you train a lot but don't improve, or that you struggle to keep up the pace?
options1: I train hard but I'm stuck
performance.afterChoice: That pattern is common. Reviewing volume, intensity and recovery—and how your body responds—usually helps more than simply toughening the plan.

injuries.label: I keep getting injuries
injuries.main:
Recurring injuries often aren't only about training.

In women athletes they can relate to accumulated fatigue, hormonal health or inadequate recovery.
injuries.question1: Is it always the same area, or does it change?
injuries.afterChoice: That hints whether there's a local issue, a load pattern or several factors. Either way, load, technique and rest are best looked at together.

understand.label: I want to understand my body
understand.main:
Cycle, energy, mood and performance are connected. Understanding your signals helps you train with better judgment and less frustration.

It's not about demanding more of yourself, but aligning effort with what your body can sustain.
understand.question1: What's hardest for you to read right now?
options1: Whether I rest or eat enough
understand.afterChoice: That's a good starting point. A simple log, reviewed with perspective, often clarifies patterns without guesswork.

closure.invite: If you'd like, we can look at your case in more depth and understand more clearly what's going on.
closure.ctaHint: Optional: assessment with a specialist team
closure.whatsappMessage: Hi, I'd like to explore my situation further with Ciclo Activa.

hero.title: BLOG
hero.description: Stories, experiences and reflections from our team about training, performance and passion for sports.

carlos.title: My Endurance Path Carlos
carlos.excerpt: Never stop believing in yourself and when someone gives you a hand and trusts you, accompanies you, is with you to achieve your goals, everything will be much easier. And so…
carlos.content: Never stop believing in yourself and when someone gives you a hand and trusts you, accompanies you, is with you to achieve your goals, everything will be much easier. And that's how I came to Enduranc3, a place where passion for sports meets science and professional knowledge. Here I found not only a team, but a family that shares the same values and goals. The path hasn't always been easy, but with dedication, effort and the right support, any goal is achievable. Every training session, every competition, every day is an opportunity to grow and surpass ourselves.

chantal.title: My Endurance Path Chantal
chantal.excerpt: Why did we create Enduranc3? Since I was very young, sports have been my main hobby and inspiration and I was very clear that my professional future and my passion should be closely…
chantal.content: Why did we create Enduranc3? Since I was very young, sports have been my main hobby and inspiration and I was very clear that my professional future and my passion should be closely related. The idea of being able to help other athletes achieve their goals while living my passion daily was something I had always dreamed of. At Enduranc3 we found the perfect way to combine sports science with the personal and professional treatment that every athlete deserves. We firmly believe that training should be individualized, based on objective data and always with a human approach. Every athlete is unique, and their planning should reflect that.

eva.title: My Endurance Path Eva
eva.excerpt: If you've made it here, I suppose it's because you want to know something more about me, but first I want to ask you a question: what is sports to you? For me, sports…
eva.content: If you've made it here, I suppose it's because you want to know something more about me, but first I want to ask you a question: what is sports to you? For me, sports is much more than competing or training. It's a way of life, a tool for personal growth, a way to know oneself and overcome limits we thought were impossible. Sports has taught me values such as discipline, perseverance, teamwork and humility. At Enduranc3, we work every day to transmit these values and help our athletes not only improve their performance, but grow as people. Because in the end, sports is a journey of self-knowledge and constant improvement.
